+    public void Notification_dedupe_key_preserves_recipient_specific_delivery_key()
+    {
+        var userId = Guid.NewGuid();

+            CompanyNotificationPriority.Critical,
+            "Workflow failed",

+            "workflow_exception",
+            Guid.NewGuid(),
+            "/workflows",
+            "{}",
+            $"workflow-exception:{Guid.NewGuid():N}:{userId:N}");

+    }

+            type.ToStorageValue(),
+            "Notification body.",

+            Guid.NewGuid(),
